string.text:
The MTs-255 is a unique Russian revolver-type shotgun developed by TsKIB SOO in 1993. It features a 5-round swing-out cylinder, a double-action trigger mechanism, and is produced in various calibers, including 12 and .410. Designed for both civilian and law enforcement use, it includes models with tactical accessories such as folding stocks and rails. Despite its innovative design, production was limited due to high manufacturing costs.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Sights: red dot sights with Picatinny mounts.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: None

MTs-255 Sawed-Off – a shortened version with a cut-off stock.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Sights: red dot sights with Picatinny mounts.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: None
